---
title: ""
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: custom
  template: dashboard.ejs
  feed: true
css:
  - assets/css/dashboard.css
  - styles.scss
include-after-body: _includes/comment-sidebar.html
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
header-includes:
  - |
    <style>
    #title-block-header, .quarto-title-header, .quarto-title-block, .title { display: none !important; }
    </style>
---
